title: S.O.N.A.R
description: S.O.N.A.R. - Scanner mod for ore, biome, structure, mobs, cable and fluid detection
body:
Subsurface Ore Navigation & Analysis Radar (S.O.N.A.R.)

S.O.N.A.R. is an industrial-grade scanning system designed for efficient underground resource detection and geological analysis.
This mod introduces a modular ore scanning device that allows players to locate underground mineral deposits. Built with an industrial aesthetic and designed to integrate naturally into tech-based modpacks, S.O.N.A.R. focuses on progression, upgrades, and precision.

🔎 Core Features

Handheld industrial ore scanner
Modular upgrade system (Range, Biome, Structures)
Energy-based operation and balanced progression
Clean, realistic industrial design

🔗 Cross-Mod Compatibility

S.O.N.A.R. is built with compatibility in mind.The scanner automatically detects ores added by other mods, making it fully usable in large modpacks. Whether it’s new metals, gems, or custom resource blocks, S.O.N.A.R. can analyze and locate them as long as they are registered as world-generated ores.
This ensures seamless integration with technology, automation, and expansion mods.

🚧 Planned Features

Future updates are planned to expand scanning capabilities beyond ores:

Structure detection (villages, dungeons, strongholds, etc.)
Biome scanning
Multi-layer geological mapping - WIP
Advanced late-game modules
Deeper integration with energy systems

⚙️ Design Philosophy

S.O.N.A.R. focuses on believable industrial technology and modular progression. It rewards investment in upgrades and energy infrastructure rather than offering instant, overpowered scanning.
Built for players who enjoy structured progression, automation, and technical gameplay.
